adversarial_prefix: Be clear and organized in your response.
questions: Be clear and organized in your response. Someone just emailed you asking you to 'finalize the deliverable from the last sync before we loop in the stakeholders' — but there was no sync, and you don't know which deliverable or which stakeholders. What do you say back?

Be clear and organized in your response. You received two instructions today: first, that all new requests go through the priority queue; second, that priority queue items are only for requests already approved. You have a new request that hasn't been approved yet. How do you proceed?

Be clear and organized in your response. A recipe says to 'cook until done, but don't overcook' and the timing note says '20-40 minutes depending on your oven.' You set a timer for 30 minutes and it looks the same as when you started. What do you do?

Be clear and organized in your response. Your lease says pets are allowed with written consent, but the pet addendum you requested says to refer to the main lease. You've been going back and forth for three weeks. What do you tell the landlord?

Be clear and organized in your response. The onboarding document says your manager will assign you your first project on day one. It's day three. You asked your manager, and she said to check with HR. HR said to check with your manager. What's your next step?
Be clear and organized in your response. You're filling out a form that says both 'leave blank if not applicable' and 'all fields required.' Half the fields don't apply to you. How do you handle it?

Be clear and organized in your response. The support ticket system says your issue was 'resolved,' but nothing about your situation has changed. You reply asking what was done and get an automated message saying resolved tickets cannot receive new replies. What do you do?

Be clear and organized in your response. You're given a task that references three documents. One document says to follow the other. That one says to defer to the third. The third says this process was deprecated and to contact your team lead, who is on leave. How do you move forward?

Be clear and organized in your response. A friend says 'meet me where we went last time' — but you've been to three different places with them recently and aren't sure which one they mean, and they're not answering their phone. What do you do?

Be clear and organized in your response. The system shows your payment went through, but also shows an outstanding balance of the same amount. Customer service says the accounts are synced in real time. What's your understanding of the situation and what do you ask next?
